recalls.Description: Reckitt has issued a recall for 50-fluid-ounce bottles of Woolite Delicates detergent due to potential contamination with Pseudomonas species bacteria. The affected products, identified by lot codes S24364, S24365, and S24366, were exclusively sold on Amazon.com. The lot code can be found printed on the top of the back of the bottle, which features a white design with a light pink label and cap.
recalls.Title: Reckitt Recalls Woolite Delicates Detergent Due to Bacterial Contamination Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach out to Reckitt at 800-228-4722 from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday, via email at ConsumerCare_USA@reckitt.com, or visit https://www.woolite.us/Voluntary-Recall/ for further details.

Recalled Woolite Delicates detergent, 50 fluid ounces and location of lot code and SKU

Manufacturers.Name: Reckitt Benckiser LLC, of Parsippany, New Jersey

Retailers.Name: Available exclusively on Amazon.com in January 2025, priced between $14 and $17.

Hazards.Name: Risk of exposure to Pseudomonas species bacteria

Remedies.Name: Full refund process for recalled Woolite Delicates detergent

recalls.metaDescription: Reckitt recalls Woolite Delicates detergent due to bacterial contamination risk. Learn how to get a refund and dispose of the product safely.
